---
pagetitle: "Andrew Zah"
toc: false
#navbar: false
---

::: {.main}
# Andrew

Welcome to my web page. My name is Andrew Zah. I’m a programmer by trade, and I’m fascinated by the world we inhabit.

My interests are mainly in computer science and programming, language learning, and fighting games, although I dabble in many hobbies.
:::
